overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a dark fantasy RPG showing a white-haired witcher character walking through a medieval harbor at night, passing wooden scaffolding and stone archways before engaging in brief melee combat with a guard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow harbor passage that opens into a wide, industrial dockside area at night. It begins with the character walking through a wooden dock passage flanked by construction scaffolding, guided by the warm glow of burning torches. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts under a large stone archway where a massive wooden water wheel and a ship hull frame the path toward two guards in red armor. The camera then captures a brief melee engagement with a sword strike before the environment expands into a broader dock area. Finally, the view opens up to reveal construction cranes and distant stone towers silhouetted against the dark night sky.
